/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/karkas_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/karkas_tests.dir/server/test_unit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/karkas_tests.dir/server/test_orbat_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/karkas_tests.dir/server/test_terrain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/karkas_tests.dir/server/test_movement.cpp.o CMakeFiles/karkas_tests.dir/server/test_sensors.cpp.o CMakeFiles/karkas_tests.dir/server/test_combat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/karkas_tests.dir/server/test_logistics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/karkas_tests.dir/server/test_simulation.cpp.o -o karkas_tests  ../libkarkas_core.a /usr/lib64/libgtest_main.so.1.15.2 -lgdal /usr/lib64/libpq.so ../_deps/yaml-cpp-build/libyaml-cppd.a /usr/lib64/libgtest.so.1.15.2
